name: reporting
description: Create and share clear human-facing reports and artifacts.

interface.longDescription: Helps Codex communicate work clearly to humans through accurate Draw.io diagrams and polished static HTML reports, plans, comparisons, galleries, and workbenches that can be shared over localhost or Tailscale.
defaultPrompt: Turn these findings into a polished HTML report.
Create a clear architecture diagram for this system.
Share this static report over Tailscale.
